purpose: Source-owned aliases for no-write cameo card-match dry runs. These aliases do not mutate canonical sets and must not be used as fuzzy matching authority.
rules: Map only a source workbook set label to an explicit existing Grookai set code.
Do not map Japanese promo families to English promo sets unless a separate audit proves equivalence.
Do not resolve ambiguous source labels by guesswork.
Keep card-not-found and ambiguous-card rows blocked.
